svg.title: Odylith benchmark quality frontier
svg.text: Grounding Benchmark Quality Frontier: grounding recall vs packet time
Each line connects the same benchmark scenario with Odylith off (red) and Odylith on (teal). Right is better and
Static chart: full recall range | all 37 published scenarios in frame
| all 60 points stay naturally visible on observed paired-time spread
All published scenario pairs stay in frame without synthetic spreading because packet time provides natural point separation.
Each line links the same benchmark
The main field spans recall 0.00 to
Odylith off / raw host CLI wins
